pr_text:
## Title: Fix uninitialized memory read in OMG mobility update loop

### Summary
The OMG (OpenAirInterface Mobility Generator) module in `openair2/UTIL/OMG/omg.c` contains a bug where the `update_nodes` function iterates through all mobility types, including SUMO, regardless of whether `SUMO_IF` is defined. When `SUMO_IF` is not defined, the `job_vector[SUMO]` entry remains uninitialized, but the loop still performs a null check on it (`job_vector[i] != NULL`). This reads uninitialized memory, c
